headline: TJX raises full year guidance as Q1 beats expectations
summary: US apparel and home fashions retailer TJX raised its annual comparable sales and profit forecasts due to an “above-plan” first-quarter (Q1), with net sales rising 9% and earnings jumping 29%.

raw.headline: TJX raises full year guidance as Q1 beats expectations
raw.summary: US apparel and home fashions retailer TJX raised its annual comparable sales and profit forecasts due to an “above-plan” first-quarter (Q1), with net sales rising 9% and earnings jumping 29%.

headline: TJX Q1 Deep Dive: Broad-Based Strength, Market Share Gains, and International Expansion
summary: Off-price retail company TJX (NYSE:TJX) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 9.2% year on year to $14.32 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.19 per share was 18.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: TJX raises annual forecast after Q1 net income jumps 28.5%
summary: Net sales grew 9% to $14.32bn from $13.11bn, and comparable sales increased 6%, up from 3% in the prior-year period.

headline: Why TJX (TJX) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of off-price retail company TJX (NYSE:TJX) jumped 5.8% in the afternoon session after the company reported fourth-quarter results that beat Wall Street's expectations, even while offering a cautious outlook.

headline: Jharonne Martis: The divide in consumer income cohorts is very evident
summary: Jharonne Martis, Director of Consumer Research at LSEG, says higher fuel prices and inflation are pressuring lower income consumers while discount retailers and value focused companies continue gaining traction.
